name: omni-safe-refactor
description: Preview / validate / apply / rollback loop for a refactor. Never let an LLM write to disk without review.

inputs.name: file
inputs.description: Path to the file you intend to modify.

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: Full new content for the file (the patch is computed as a full replacement).

steps.explain: Render a unified diff so the user can confirm the change is what they want.
Run static checks (ruff/eslint/mypy/tsc) on the proposed content.
Show any pre-existing diagnostics so we don't blame the new patch for them.
Write to disk + create snapshot + record EditSession. Returns session_id for rollback.
